comment: Routes audited via `rg -l 'page-hero|landing-cta' plugins/soleur/docs/pages plugins/soleur/docs/_includes`. The 9 /legal/<sub>/ markdown pages are deferred to a follow-up — same template family, lower conversion impact. /company-as-a-service/ uses .content-page-header (different visual) so it's gated separately if/when that template breaks.
